CurrentIssues.ID: MaxLineLength:DataChannelMessage.kt:DataChannelMessage.Companion$private const val OPEN_FIXED_BYTES = 12 // type(1) + channel type(1) + priority(2) + reliability(4) + label len(2) + protocol len(2)

MaxLineLength:SctpErrorCause.kt:SctpErrorCause.Companion$/** Wraps a decoded on-wire span: [paddedView] is the padding-inclusive slice, [length] the declared value length. */
